# Transcrição: 3_Strategies_To_Interrupt_A_Never-Ending_Talker

## [00:00 - 02:15]

Vin, how do I stop people who keep talking and never stop and I can't even get a word in and I have something really important to say? I feel like I'm the perfect, perfect person to answer this because I'm one of those people. I'm going to give you the secret on how to take us down. You need to shut the f*** up! I'll give you two strategies that are a softer approach and then I'll give you a really strong nuclear approach. Approach number one, visual indicators. So if I'm going from this position to this position, I clearly have something to say. You can do the palm, you can do the finger. A variation of that visually lets the other person know that you have something to say. Now, if you are speaking to someone like me, sometimes when I get really passionate, I basically become blind and I'm just talking, talking, talking, talking, talking, I love the sound of my own voice, oh, I love my idea and I'll just keep going. So then to get through to me, now you can pair a visual indicator with a sound, auditory. So now instead of just going like this, I can go, oh, just quickly. Oh, all of a sudden now I've paired a visual indicator with an auditory indicator that I have something to say. And those two strategies should be enough to be able to deal with the worst of us. However, there is a point zero, zero, zero, one percent of our population who are just relentless. Oh, they're monsters. They are even monsters that monsters are scared of. I luckily don't fall into that category. But if you do find a monster that is that scary, that just doesn't stop after visual and auditory indicators, well, then what you need to do now is you need to create space for you to speak. You need to stand up for yourself. So say, for example, you're talking to this person and they just keep talking because again, they love the sound of their own voice and they just really love their idea and they're really passionate and sometimes they can be very egotistical and they just want to keep going. You just have to be like, Vin, I just want to quickly jump in here. Vin, I know you're still talking, but this is really important. I need to get this across and I would love to just take one minute to share my idea. And even if I'm talking over the top of you while this is happening, just full commit to creating your own space and they will stop. They will. Don't do the whole, I've been there just a little bit. Oh, damn, he's still going. Yep. He bloody loves himself, that guy. That guy is so annoying. Look at me. Can't even grow a mustache. Don't stop. You just have to full commit and create space for yourself. Very rarely will you have to do that, but you now have the three approaches.
